landing.title: My Anime Collection
landing.title_description: My Anime Collection is an application that lets you track and discover new anime.

vegeta.name: Vegeta
vegeta.description: Get out of my way Earthling! I need to fight Kakarot!

pikachu.name: Pikachu
pikachu.description: PIKA PIKA!! Pikachu! Pika PIKA pika pika. Pika PIKA pika pika.

shinji.name: Shinji
shinji.description: I guess I like My Anime Collection. Please don't make me pilot the EVA anymore...

pegasus.name: Pegasus
pegasus.description: The best thing ever creAATED~~~ Good job, Zachy boy!

kaneki.name: Kaneki Ken
kaneki.description: Just like my journey from a regular college student to a half-ghoul, this app transforms ordinary into extraordinary!

light.name: Light Yagami
light.description: I've found a new use for this app. Kira's judgment is now digital!

erwin.name: Erwin Smith
erwin.description: This app is our key to freedom! Titans won't stand a chance against it!

why.title: Why use My Anime Collection?
why.point1: It's 100% free and contains no ads.
why.point2: It's easy to use and intuitive.
why.point3: We take security very seriously and use advanced encryption to protect your information from breaches and hacking attempts.
why.point4: My Anime Collection does not use cookies to track you for advertising purposes and does not request personal data from any third parties.
why.point5: We're always working on adding new features and improvements.
why.point6: AI-powered anime suggestions help you discover your next favorite show.

call_to_action.title: Let's go find some anime!
